violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Observed a waste bucket under the espresso machine.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Observed using napkins instead of paper towels

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Observed hand sink had no paper towels.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
